In this serious of articles an attempt is made to explain the
importance of the loth house in relation to profession, avocation or
busi'less. The notes hereunder are based on the various dicta contained
i'l the ancient. standard books including Phala Deepika,. Ja taka Parijata,
Saravali, Sanketa Nidhi and Oevakeralam.
